race.comment: ZORRO'S FLIGHT (11) resumed over 1200m last time out and turned in a solid effort to finish second at Donald. His best form early days was better than this level and he gets every chance to improve from the good gate. CELTICS (4) started at $10 last time on the back of a win at Geelong two starts ago but was below his best, finishing sixth over 1200m at Flemington. This is easier and he should take beating despite the gap between runs. GOLDEN SPRITZ (10) was in commission last time out and finished one length from the winner in second over 1400m at Cranbourne. Going well and maps for every hope on the quick backup. GARNACHO (16) has been in the placings his past two starts, finishing third over 1400m at this track last time out. Should be right there again. CHOWDOWN (9) has been okay since a fresh win and has claims on best.
